"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2022.2\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\FoP-Project-G66.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\JETBRA~1\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\FoP-Project-G66.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\FoP-Project-G66.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\JETBRA~1\MinGW\bin\G__~1.EXE -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\FoP-Project-G66.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o FoP-Project-G66.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libFoP-Project-G66.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\FoP-Project-G66.dir\linklibs.rsp
